textByHashes.c2c7c0fcc4d1a9b9373d45a5b0f6ad85204fc0da: They are my sssaviours, I owe them my life.
textByHashes.78152b04e71b2f0c75d2a6f65827f6e67c0feab6: Why, yesss it isss... Many yearsss ago now. 30? 40? I've lost count.
textByHashes.3cf2b143dd9ed95abe1286ad677dafc2cacfa4a4: I wasss a Captain of the Shayzien Army, Captain Reynard Koil, ssstationed up on Shayziens' wall.
textByHashes.892280fdac2c7ddcfcf913d5755d103ec75de94b: We were told to attack the lizardmen, for they were apparently attacking usss. I led the charge.
textByHashes.207589e4a4e140c639203aefa54831ba606915b5: Alasss, I took an arrow to the eye and missed the battle. I woke up here, worried for my life.
textByHashes.4f34df6c28886d0a9d420b09fda192199fe72145: At first, that isss what I thought, but they tended my woundsss and fed me well.
textByHashes.e8163853858dfb9f53a8edceeaa0fbf8bb22e900: I assssumed my people would come for me once they sssaw my body wasn't amongssst the dead, but they never did.
textByHashes.34bfeca9b8e688fe302469e2f2da0656b53105a7: Oh yesss, once my ssstrength returned, I went and ssspoke to the Shayzien Army.
textByHashes.5bb2420ad5c4a5bdb442f939923db63663686ea1: They thought I wasss a lizardman and fired arrowsss at me, ssso I returned here.
textByHashes.3478841267f59ea824c47d5cd27969612f417868: I found these in thisss shrine. I guesss they belonged to sssome long dead priest.
textByHashes.002da3a6ecdc0cefafb360511b2b45f600cd89ed: This grossss ssswamp is my home. You sssure do ask a lot of questionsss, adventurer.
textByHashes.6201c28097b466d708bca57399a1055a24c6089e: You do not recognissse it, adventurer? It would ssseem hissstory is written by the winnersss, for that isss the sssymbol of the Great Lord Xeric.
textByHashes.5ebefbd4840968b37846af854fcf793b19be05e9: Or at leassst, that isss what the lizardmen tell me...
textByHashes.dc8365b6f60ce0a6cbbe473a7f239666acddceff: Oh, that wasss a lifetime ago... Sssuch a wonderful little one.
textByHashes.a69fe1f81ab87d02c98bc832350341b3c6733b70: Lassst I heard, her mind had cracked. Her father died and...
